eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: New Hampshire; at 5:32 PM on JUL 11, 2026 Effective until 6:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The New Hampshire State Police has activated the New Hampshire Emergency Alert System in order to conduct a practice demo.  This concludes this test of the New Hampshire Emergency Alert System. No action required.
